languages.original_text: "Primitive civilisations are always amusing in their inability to grasp the full scope of their powerlessness — and their simultaneous insistence on denying it altogether. The path for those in this place is determined by me alone — all the more so now that your actions have forced me to come here in person."

languages.text: "Примитивные цивилизации всегда забавляют своей неспособностью осознать всю меру своего бессилия — и одновременной настойчивостью в ее полном отрицании. Путь для тех, кто находится в этом месте, определяю только я — тем более сейчас, когда ваши действия заставили меня прибыть лично".

"Primitive civilisations are always amusing in their inability to grasp the full scope of their powerlessness — and their simultaneous insistence on denying it altogether. The path for those in this place is determined by me alone — all the more so now that your actions have forced me to come here in person."

languages.text: 「原始的な生命体は、自分の無力さを理解できないことにいつも面白がっている。そして同時に、それを否定しようとする。この次元にいる者たちの道は、私一人によって決まる。君たちの冒険が私をここに引きずり込んだ今、なおのことだ。」
languages.original_text: "Primitive life forms are always amusing in their inability to grasp the full scope of their powerlessness — and their simultaneous insistence on denying it altogether. The path for those in this dimension is determined by me alone — all the more so now that your escapades have forced me to come here in person."

traits.locale_text: 「原始的な生命体は、自分の無力さを理解できないことにいつも面白がっている。そして同時に、それを否定しようとする。この次元にいる者たちの道は、私一人によって決まる。君たちの冒険が私をここに引きずり込んだ今、なおのことだ。」

languages.text: “原始文明总是如此有趣。他们既认不清自己究竟有多无能，还死不承认自己的无能。位于此地的所有人的命运，全凭我一人定夺。而现在更是如此，你们的行为竟逼得我亲自降临此地。”
languages.original_text: "Primitive civilisations are always amusing in their inability to grasp the full scope of their powerlessness — and their simultaneous insistence on denying it altogether. The path for those in this place is determined by me alone — all the more so now that your actions have forced me to come here in person."

traits.locale_text: “原始文明总是如此有趣。他们既认不清自己究竟有多无能，还死不承认自己的无能。位于此地的所有人的命运，全凭我一人定夺。而现在更是如此，你们的行为竟逼得我亲自降临此地。”

languages.text: «Las civilizaciones primitivas nunca dejan de resultar cómicas. Son incapaces de comprender la extensión de su propia impotencia e insisten en negarla por completo. El destino de quienes se adentran en este lugar me pertenece únicamente a mí, especialmente ahora que vuestras acciones me han forzado a acudir en persona».
languages.original_text: "Primitive civilisations are always amusing in their inability to grasp the full scope of their powerlessness — and their simultaneous insistence on denying it altogether. The path for those in this place is determined by me alone — all the more so now that your actions have forced me to come here in person."

traits.locale_text: «Las civilizaciones primitivas nunca dejan de resultar cómicas. Son incapaces de comprender la extensión de su propia impotencia e insisten en negarla por completo. El destino de quienes se adentran en este lugar me pertenece únicamente a mí, especialmente ahora que vuestras acciones me han forzado a acudir en persona».

languages.text: "Primitive Zivilisationen amüsieren mich immer wieder mit ihrer Unfähigkeit, das ganze Ausmaß ihrer Machtlosigkeit zu erkennen ... und ihrer Beharrlichkeit, es zu leugnen. An diesem Ort gebe ich allein die Richtung vor ... erst recht, nachdem mich eure Taten gezwungen haben, persönlich hier zu erscheinen."
languages.original_text: "Primitive civilisations are always amusing in their inability to grasp the full scope of their powerlessness — and their simultaneous insistence on denying it altogether. The path for those in this place is determined by me alone — all the more so now that your actions have forced me to come here in person."

traits.locale_text: "Primitive Zivilisationen amüsieren mich immer wieder mit ihrer Unfähigkeit, das ganze Ausmaß ihrer Machtlosigkeit zu erkennen ... und ihrer Beharrlichkeit, es zu leugnen. An diesem Ort gebe ich allein die Richtung vor ... erst recht, nachdem mich eure Taten gezwungen haben, persönlich hier zu erscheinen."

languages.text: « Les civilisations primitives m'amuseront toujours, incapables qu'elles sont de saisir toute l'ampleur de leur impuissance qu'elles s'évertuent à nier. Moi seul détermine la voie à suivre par ceux qui se trouvent dans cet endroit, surtout maintenant que vos actions m'ont obligé à venir ici en personne. »
languages.original_text: "Primitive civilisations are always amusing in their inability to grasp the full scope of their powerlessness — and their simultaneous insistence on denying it altogether. The path for those in this place is determined by me alone — all the more so now that your actions have forced me to come here in person."

Moi seul détermine la voie à suivre par ceux qui se trouvent dans cet endroit, surtout maintenant que vos actions m'ont obligé à venir ici en personne. »

languages.text: "İlkel uygarlıklar, güçsüzlüklerinin tam kapsamını kavrayamamaları ve aynı zamanda bunu tamamen inkâr etme konusundaki ısrarlarıyla her zaman eğlencelidir. Bu yerdekiler için yolu sadece ben belirlerim. Özellikle de sizin eylemleriniz beni buraya bizzat gelmeye zorladığı için."
languages.original_text: "Primitive civilisations are always amusing in their inability to grasp the full scope of their powerlessness — and their simultaneous insistence on denying it altogether. The path for those in this place is determined by me alone — all the more so now that your actions have forced me to come here in person."
